active_blockers.title: Live visualizer UI verification is blocked by Clerk-authenticated session access in the integrated browser
active_blockers.impact: The visualizer route correctly redirects to sign-in and the main route cutover is complete, but completing an authenticated browser session for the full preview-generation browser proof is still blocked by Clerk verification flow access in the current automation browser.

active_blockers.title: Persisted visualizer mask debug metadata is not exposed in preview DTO/API responses
active_blockers.impact: The board-mask generation and Cloudinary mask persistence path are wired and audited server-side, but exposing persisted mask metadata to clients would widen the current preview DTO and preview lookup route contract.

resolved_blockers.title: Visualizer reads remained split between actions and fetchers
resolved_blockers.resolution: Moved visualizer preview/upload reuse and preview DTO retrieval reads into lib/fetchers/visualizer.fetchers.ts and updated visualizer action tests to use the new fetcher-based contract.

resolved_blockers.title: Visualizer app routes read directly from Prisma inside app/**
resolved_blockers.resolution: Re-audited the live preview/upload image routes, confirmed they already read through lib/fetchers/visualizer.fetchers.ts, and validated signed asset delivery behavior with focused route tests.

resolved_blockers.title: Hugging Face visualizer configuration is duplicated across legacy and visualizer-specific modules
resolved_blockers.resolution: Removed the dead legacy image-to-image preview adapter from lib/integrations/huggingface.ts and kept preview-path configuration sourced from the canonical lib/visualizer/huggingface/client.ts surface.

resolved_blockers.title: Current main-branch visualizer generation path does not prove enforced mask consumption end to end
resolved_blockers.resolution: Confirmed the live action path builds a board mask, passes boardMaskBuffer into the HF Space client, persists the mask asset when available, and records mask URL/strategy metadata in preview audit payloads.

resolved_blockers.title: Instruction-file overwrite patch conflict
resolved_blockers.resolution: Used explicit delete-and-recreate flow for deterministic content replacement

resolved_blockers.title: Visualizer preview generation is not using a working mask-guided AI path
resolved_blockers.resolution: Removed deterministic fallback execution from the visualizer action pipeline, installed @gradio/client, switched the default HF backend to a working public multi-image edit Space, and validated real HF generation directly against the Space with source-plus-reference inputs.
